title: Product
description: A product registered inside a venture (Opportunity Management v2). A stable asset referenced by its id from use-cases (productRef) and teams (productRefs[]). Product id is intended to be stable across the venture so a future federation / SaaS layer can join a cross-venture product catalog on it (see #015 open question 4).

tenantId.description: Reserved for the future multi-tenant SaaS layer; null in the local file-based store.

workspaceId.description: Reserved workspace scope for the future SaaS layer; null in the local store.

id.description: Stable unique product id (asset identity; future federation joins on this).

slug.description: Filesystem-friendly slug, also the '<slug>.product.json' filename stem.

repo.description: Optional source repository (URL or 'org/name') the product is built from.

component.description: Optional component identifier within the repo (e.g. used in UC-<COMPONENT>-<NNN> document ids).

vendorRef.description: Optional id of the organization that owns/produces this product. Resolved by the consumer's organization/subject registry. Null when unknown or not applicable.
